meta.title: Jean Piaget (1896–1980)
meta.sourceDoc: 71. P3 - Jean Piaget (1896–1980) 让·皮亚杰.pdf

passageNotes.label: Source
passageNotes.text: Explanations were extracted from the answer-analysis table in the source PDF by OCR. Minor OCR mistakes may remain; the official answer key is used for the answer field.

questionSections.text:
题目 27
答案：C
PDF 定位：段2:"Itwasashiftcomparabletothewaymodern anthropology displaced stories of primitive tribes... One might say that Piaget was the first to take children's thinking seriously."
PDF 解析：作者用"现代人类学的转变"来作比，说明皮亚杰的观点同样标志着 教育观念的重大转折。

题目 28
答案：A
PDF 定位：段 5:"Classifying them as "true'or"false'misses the point..."
PDF 解析：对话显示儿童说话是否准确并非关键，关键在于其思维过程，因此 选"事实准确性并不重要"。

题目 29
答案：D
PDF 定位：段6:*each time we tryto teach them something too quickly, we keep them from inventing it themselves."
PDF 解析：皮亚杰反对立即纠正，以保护孩子自行解释世界的信心。

题目 30
答案：C
PDF 定位：段7:"Einstein was intrigued...going faster can takemore time...runs so contrary to common sense."
PDF 解析：即便看似荒诞的想法（"越快越耗时"）也值得兴趣与研究，说明看 似非理性也可能有价值。

题目 31
答案：A
PDF 定位：全文综合，尤其段3、8-10
PDF 解析：文章不仅谈教育，还提到心理学、AI、信息加工等多领域影响，故 为"概述皮亚杰对多门科学领域的贡献"。

题目 32
答案：logical
PDF 定位：段1:"thoughtprocesses thathad their ownkindof order and their own special logic."
PDF 解析：皮亚杰认为儿童思维比表面看上去更"有逻辑"。

题目 33
答案：theories
PDF 定位：段3:"little scientists who are constantly creating and testing theirownhypotheses...""；段6亦有"If theirtheoriesare always greeted..."
PDF 解析：孩子反复验证的是自己的"理论"。

题目 34
答案：psychology
PDF 定位：段3末句："his influenceonpsychologymaybelonger lasting."
PDF 解析：影响最大的学科领域被明确指出是"心理学"。

题目 35
答案：brain
PDF 定位：段10:"challenged by the currentfashion of viewing knowledge as an intrinsic property of the brain."
PDF 解析：质疑声音将知识归因于"大脑"，与皮亚杰形成对比。

题目 36
答案：teachers
PDF 定位：段 8:"every teacher in training still memorises Piaget's successive stages...
PDF 解析：皮亚杰原理仍广泛用于教师的职业发展。

题目 37
答案：NOT GIVEN
PDF 定位：段4只描述他在巴黎"注意到"错误，并未评价方法是否"创新"。
PDF 解析：文中未说明这些技术是否"创新"，信息缺失。

题目 38
答案：NO
PDF 定位：段 6:"piaget was not an educator and never laid down rules about how to intervene..."
PDF 解析：作者明确说皮亚杰没有给出成人应如何授课的明确指导。

题目 39
答案：YES
PDF 定位：段8-9:"His real interestwas epistemology... explored multiple ways of knowing."
PDF 解析：文章肯定他对认识论的重大贡献。

题目 40
答案：YES
PDF 定位：段10末句："newdiscoveriesdonotsignificantlyreducethe gap, but only increase the mystery."
PDF 解析：作者认为关于知识本质仍有许多未知。
